title: Ceva Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ceva Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Ceva Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ceva Logistics India:
Ceva Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ceva Logistics India!
